summary: Solid test suite with comprehensive coverage of the three retention policies (max age, keep-latest-N, max total size) and their combined behavior. Tests are well-organized with effective helper fixtures and clear semantic names. However, rigor is limited by missing edge case tests (empty artifact lists, single items, exact boundary values, same-timestamp artifacts) and absent error-scenario testing for policy evaluation (invalid JSON, malformed artifacts, negative values). File I/O error handling is tested, but policy evaluation errors are not. Design is good with independent, non-brittle tests, though concerns are somewhat mixed (unit tests alongside workflow structure validation). The integration harness (Run-ActTests.ps1) provides only one test case via act; more comprehensive end-to-end scenarios would strengthen confidence. Would catch regressions in common paths but lacks depth in edge cases.
